goal: Make declared cognitive provider lanes executable by the conveyor worker runtime while keeping provider output candidate-only until governed gates accept it.

resolver: support tiny universal language mechanics only when proven missing
conveyor: run gates and policy checks as declared conveyor authority
receipts: prove every handoff and provider participation

requiredLaneWork.description: Bind declared dispatch contracts to worker adapters without changing resolver package ownership.
Invoke Gemini Flash from the conveyor worker lane and emit dispatch, response, and invocation receipts.
Invoke OpenAI only as a governed fallback and emit provider-attributed candidate receipts.
Route provider candidate output through declared gates before strategy authority is promoted.

forbiddenWork: patch resolver package for Gemini or OpenAI product flow
accept mock or stale provider output as cognitive evidence
create durable policy/gate/SOG authority by platform-agent hand-authoring
completionPosture: This handoff corrects the ownership boundary: provider execution is a conveyor worker lane responsibility, not resolver evolution.
